questions.question: Let L be a regular language over {0, 1} and let A be an automaton for L. Prove that if |Q| = n (number of states) and |Σ| = m (number of input symbols), then the total number of possible words in L is at most m^n. (5 marks)
Show that the complement of a regular language L is regular. You need to construct an automaton that accepts the complement of L. (5 marks)

An NFA M for a regular language L is said to be equivalent to an NFA M' if L = L'. (a) Show that if M and M' are equivalent and M has n states, then M' also has n states. (b) Show that if M' has n states and M has m states, then M must have m states. (5 marks)
